+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-150
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-24_13-17-27+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- golden-projects/cad-parametric/.rge-project — removed `schema_version` field; rewrote `target_tiers: ["desktop"]` to bare `target_tiers: [desktop]`.
+- golden-projects/material-zoo/.rge-project — same reconciliation pattern.
+- golden-projects/physics-puzzle/.rge-project — same reconciliation pattern.
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project — same reconciliation pattern.
+- golden-projects/skinned-character/.rge-project — same reconciliation pattern.
+- golden-projects/stress-world/.rge-project — same reconciliation pattern.
+- crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs — added positive Project-load assertion plus deliberate-break parse-failure negative.
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-150_TASK_2026-05-24_13-06-25+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- No production source under `crates/rge-data/src/**` was touched. `Project`, `TargetTier`, `SchemaVersion`, serde attrs, migrations, and loaders are unchanged.
+- Six golden-project manifests under `golden-projects/*/.rge-project` were edited to the current `rge_data::Project` wire shape:
+  - `target_tiers: ["desktop"],` → `target_tiers: [desktop],` (bare `TargetTier` enum form per `#[serde(rename_all = "lowercase")]`).
+  - `    schema_version: "0.1.0",` line removed; the existing `version: "0.1.0"` field is preserved.
+  - All other manifest fields (`name`, `description`, `plugins`, `scenes`) are byte-identical to the prior versions.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_manifest_parses_as_project` — reads the tracked `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` via `CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR + ../../golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`, parses with `ron::from_str` as `rge_data::Project`, and asserts `version == SchemaVersion::V0_1_0`, `name == "simple-scene"`, non-empty `description` after trimming, `target_tiers == vec![TargetTier::Desktop]`, `plugins.is_empty()`, `scenes.is_empty()`. Schema-load-only; no scene files, GPU, asset-store, cook, screenshot, or typed-component bridging exercised.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_manifest_with_required_field_removed_fails_to_parse` — reads the same manifest text, strips the required `    name: "simple-scene",\n` line in memory only (no disk write), and asserts `ron::from_str::<Project>` returns `Err(_)`.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None — task constraints forbid doctrine / status / planning / ADR / handoff-protocol document edits.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+Skipped — the bullet lists above are complete.
+
+## Verification Results
+
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=no` (pre-edit) → exit 0; output empty (no pre-existing tracked changes).
+- `cargo test -p rge-data --test golden_simple_scene_schema -j 1` → exit 0; `2 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored`.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` → exit 0; `VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.` Steps run:
+  1. `cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check` — ok.
+  2. `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- all` — ok (10 enforcement PASS + 1 supplementary).
+  3. `cargo test -p rge-tool-architecture-lints --all-targets` — ok.
+  4. `cargo deny check` — ok.
+  5. `cargo test --workspace --all-targets --no-fail-fast -j 1` — ok.
+  6. `cargo test --workspace --doc --no-fail-fast -j 1` — ok.
+  7. `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run` — ok.
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=no` (post-implementation) → exit 0; output shows only the six listed `.rge-project` manifests as `M` (see Worktree State).
+- A first `cargo +nightly fmt --check` pass surfaced one rustfmt diff in the new test (single multi-line `unwrap_or_else` collapsed to one line); fixed in place and the gate is now green.
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None — execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope. Only the six listed manifests and `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs` were edited or added; no production source, Cargo file, workflow, script, schema, doctrine, or other handoff packet was touched.
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+None.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files (modified, uncommitted): six golden-project manifests — `golden-projects/{cad-parametric,material-zoo,physics-puzzle,simple-scene,skinned-character,stress-world}/.rge-project`.
+- Untracked items (this dispatch's own artifacts):
+  - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-150_TASK_2026-05-24_13-06-25+0300.md` (TASK packet from Planner).
+  - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-150_TASK_2026-05-24_13-06-25+0300.meta.json` (TASK packet sidecar).
+  - `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs` (new integration test).
+  - This EXEC report file (and its sidecar, once `new-handoff.ps1 -Finalize` writes it).
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-150`.
+- Last commit: `273db8f chore(dispatch): seed task #33 golden manifest schema reconciliation`.
+

+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE

+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-150
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-24_13-06-25+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- golden-projects/cad-parametric/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/material-zoo/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/physics-puzzle/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/skinned-character/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/stress-world/.rge-project
+- crates/rge-data/src/project.rs
+- crates/rge-data/src/schema_version.rs
+- crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs
+- .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-150_EXEC_*.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-150_EXEC_*.meta.json
+- ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md
+- GitHub issue #150
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Fix GitHub issue #150 by reconciling the six tracked golden-project `.rge-project` manifests with the current public `rge_data::Project` schema, then add a narrow schema-load integration test for `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`. The work is complete when all six manifests parse as `Project`, the focused `rge-data` integration test passes, and the canonical dispatch verification gate passes, without changing production schema or broadening into renderer, asset, cook, scene-content, workflow, or documentation work.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `golden-projects/cad-parametric/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/material-zoo/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/physics-puzzle/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/skinned-character/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/stress-world/.rge-project`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- Any file under `crates/rge-data/src/**` or any other production source directory.
+- Any file under `crates/rge-data/tests/**` other than `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`.
+- Any file under `golden-projects/**` other than the six `.rge-project` manifests listed in `MAY edit`.
+- Any scene file, fixture, generated asset, binary asset, renderer comparison artifact, cook output, screenshot baseline, or typed component bridging file.
+- Renderer, GPU, asset-store, cook, editor, shell, runtime, kernel, marketplace, or generated code surfaces.
+- Any Cargo file, including root or crate `Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`, generated Cargo metadata, or dependency declarations.
+- Any workflow under `.github/**`.
+- Any PowerShell script, shell script, schema file, architecture lint, doctrine document, status document, planning document, ADR, or root-level repository document.
+- Any existing handoff packet or existing dispatch log, including this TASK packet after execution begins.
+- Any GitHub issue, label, PR, branch, review, comment, commit, remote state, or queue metadata except the queue runner's normal issue lifecycle for this dispatch.
+
+### MAY add new files
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs` if it does not already exist.
+- Exactly one execution report matching `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-150_EXEC_*.md`.
+- The matching `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-150_EXEC_*.meta.json` sidecar only if `new-handoff.ps1 -Finalize` creates it while finalizing the EXEC report.
+- This dispatch's own queue-runner log under `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md` only if the queue runner creates it as part of normal dispatch operation.
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- Any source file, test file other than `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`, golden-project file, scene file, fixture, generated asset, screenshot baseline, renderer comparison artifact, cook output, Cargo file, dependency file, schema, script, workflow, architecture lint, TASK packet, REVIEW packet, CLOSEOUT packet, issue note, design document, doctrine document, status document, or planning document.
+- Any handoff packet other than this dispatch's single `ISSUE-150_EXEC_*.md` report and optional matching `.meta.json` sidecar.
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- The six golden-project manifests listed in `MAY edit` are adjusted to the current `rge_data::Project` wire shape without changing the production schema.
+- In each of the six manifests, `target_tiers: ["desktop"]` is changed to the current bare `TargetTier` enum wire form `target_tiers: [desktop]`.
+- In each of the six manifests, the extra `schema_version: "0.1.0"` field is removed while the existing `version: "0.1.0"` field is preserved.
+- No manifest name, description, plugin list, scene list, or version value is changed except as required to make the manifests parse against `Project`.
+- Exactly one `rge-data` integration test file is added at `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`.
+- The positive test reads `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` from the repository, parses it as `rge_data::Project`, and remains schema-load-only.
+- The positive test asserts the current simple-scene fields:
+  - `Project.version` is `SchemaVersion::V0_1_0`.
+  - `Project.name` is `simple-scene`.
+  - `Project.description` is non-empty after trimming whitespace.
+  - `Project.target_tiers` is exactly `[TargetTier::Desktop]`.
+  - `Project.plugins` is empty.
+  - `Project.scenes` is empty.
+- A deliberate-break negative test variant reads the same manifest text, mutates a required field in memory without writing to disk, and asserts parsing the mutated text as `rge_data::Project` fails.
+- One `EXECUTION_REPORT` packet documents the implementation, before and after worktree status, verification commands, exact exit codes, and any pre-existing tracked changes.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- The only source-facing repository changes are the six listed golden-project `.rge-project` manifests and `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`.
+- All six golden-project manifests parse as `rge_data::Project` through the current schema without any production-code or schema change.
+- All six golden-project manifests retain `version: "0.1.0"` and contain no `schema_version` field.
+- All six golden-project manifests use bare enum target tiers, specifically `target_tiers: [desktop]`, not quoted string target tiers.
+- Exactly one test file under `crates/rge-data/tests/**` is added or edited for this dispatch, and it is `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`.
+- The test file reads the real `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` path and parses it as `rge_data::Project`.
+- The test file asserts version, name, non-empty description, exact desktop target tier, empty plugins, and empty scenes for the current simple-scene manifest.

+
+## Planner Notes
+
+The current `Project` schema has these required top-level fields: `version`, `name`, `description`, `target_tiers`, `plugins`, and `scenes`. `SchemaVersion` remains serialized as a quoted dotted triple such as `"0.1.0"`, while `TargetTier` uses `#[serde(rename_all = "lowercase")]` enum tokens in RON, so `TargetTier::Desktop` serializes as bare `desktop`.
+
+This issue intentionally supersedes the earlier single-manifest load-only shape by first fixing the six existing golden manifests so they are valid `Project` values. The test should still stay focused on `simple-scene`; the other five manifests are acceptance-covered by the canonical gate and by the fact that they use the same schema reconciliation pattern.
+
+Prefer a small integration test that uses existing public `rge_data` types and `ron::from_str`. A runtime read using `CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR` plus the relative path to `../../golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` is acceptable because it exercises the actual tracked golden project file instead of a copied fixture.
+
+Under the orchestrator protocol, no `_REVIEW_` or `_CLOSEOUT_` packet is expected from this TASK. The only new packet produced by execution should be the `ISSUE-150_EXEC_*.md` report, plus its optional generated sidecar and the queue runner's own log if applicable.
+

+MUST align the six golden-projects/*.rge-project manifests to the current rge_data::Project schema without changing production schema
+MUST change quoted target_tiers placeholders to the current bare TargetTier enum wire form in all six golden manifests
+MUST remove the extra schema_version field from all six golden manifests while preserving the existing version field
+MUST add exactly one rge-data integration test file at crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs
+MUST keep the test schema-load-only and assert the current simple-scene Project fields plus a deliberate-break parse-failure variant
+MUST NOT add scene files, renderer/GPU behavior, asset-store behavior, cook output, screenshot baselines, typed component bridging, Cargo changes, workflow changes, scripts, doctrine, or status docs
+MUST run cargo test -p rge-data --test golden_simple_scene_schema and the canonical .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1 gate successfully
+```
